data.keyword: Best therapy providers in Louisville KY for families and children
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Best therapy providers in Louisville KY for families and children

result.keyword: Best therapy providers in Louisville KY for families and children

items.markdown:
Based on local listings and reputation in Louisville, KY, several providers are highly regarded for child, adolescent, and family therapy. These providers offer services ranging from play therapy to specialized family counseling.[[1]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/)[[2]](https://www.pivotalcounseling.com/family-counselors-greeley-co)[[3]](https://searhc.org/care-specialties/individual-family-therapy/)

**Top Family & Child Therapy Providers in Louisville, KY** 

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-308653200f57:4)
Grace Psychological Services 5.0 (22)  
Marriage or relationship counselor  
Closed 12802 Townepark Way Ste 100  
Recognized for child-centered therapy, offering expert care in CBT, TF-CBT, and play therapy for children and families. They are rated highly in the area, offering both in-person and online options.

![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/gps-cs-s/APNQkAHJEElTT51FCE19McDp8mj7aHbhJtWp--R9p0ezV2dOEU5P-Gf7ulTl6woZXafpiHWEVh5YVaZ-W0ctVk6tAj7N75U7BjUbOX8nrbHloF28l4fGcqf6gP83fqoEWwPzQHWKIcdz=s192-w192-h144-n-k-no)
Creative Family Counseling 4.0 (4)  
Family counselor  
Closed Prospect, KY  
Features a team specializing in child, teen, and family counseling with locations in Louisville and Prospect.

Provides comprehensive family therapy services, with multiple locations in Louisville (Executive Park and Eastpoint Parkway).

![](https://streetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com/v1/thumbnail?panoid=av7BdQ-W1bHlMgQm-CCxog&cb_client=search.gws-prod.gps&yaw=38.667984&pitch=0&thumbfov=100&w=82&h=82)
Jim Walker, LCSW 5.0 (4)  
Mental health service  
Closed 6006 Brownsboro Park Blvd Ste A  
Offers in-office and virtual family or couples psychotherapy.[](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/) [[1]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/)[[2]](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/)[[3]](https://lifestance.com/services/family-therapy/ky/louisville/)[[4]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/6)[[5]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/marriage-counseling-louisville/)

**Specialized Services Available** 

- **Play Therapy & Trauma Care**: Grace Psychological Services focuses heavily on evidence-based treatment for children facing behavioral or emotional challenges.
- **Family Counseling**: Creative Family Counseling emphasizes strengthening family dynamics, particularly for children and teens.[](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/) [[1]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/)[[2]](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/)[[3]](https://www.therapylab.com/blogs/how-family-counseling-can-strengthen-relationships)[[4]](https://ourchildrenourfuturefl.org/family-therapy-counseling-hollywood-fl/)

For a complete list of individual therapists specializing in children (ages 6-10), [Psychology Today's directory](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=children-6-to-10) features providers such as Haven Family Counseling, Innovative Family Therapy , and others.[](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=children-6-to-10) [[1]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=children-6-to-10)

To help narrow down the best provider, could you let me know:

- **What specific concerns** are you looking to address (e.g., anxiety, behavioral issues, family transition)?
- **What is the age** of the child/children?
- Do you prefer **in-person or telehealth** sessions?

I can then give you a more tailored recommendation.
